title: Kingfisher Disposable Foil Flan Dishes, Pack of 9, Oven and Freezer Safe
features: VERSATILE USE: Perfect for baking individual flans, quiches, tarts and pies with convenient disposable design
PACK CONTENTS: Set includes 9 individual aluminium flan dishes, ideal for batch baking and food storage
TEMPERATURE SAFE: Suitable for both oven cooking and freezer storage, offering excellent temperature resistance
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from strong, food-grade aluminium foil that maintains shape during baking
CONVENIENT SIZE: Each dish measures approximately 12 cm in diameter, perfect for individual portion sizes
description: Perfect for creating delicious homemade quiches, tarts, and flans, these versatile foil dishes are an essential addition to your kitchen. The pack includes 9 individual flan dishes, ideal for both single servings and batch baking. These sturdy aluminium foil containers are suitable for both oven use and freezer storage, making them excellent for meal preparation and storage. The ribbed edges provide structural stability and help achieve perfectly shaped crusts every time. These disposable dishes eliminate the need for washing up and are convenient for transporting baked goods to parties or events. Their practical design ensures even heat distribution for consistent baking results. Whether you're making sweet desserts or savoury pies, these versatile flan dishes are up to the task. The dishes are lightweight yet durable enough to hold your heaviest ingredients without buckling.
